description: Maps a canonical payload to its leaf_hash via the binary leaf_hash_input construction in §4.1. payloadHex is the canonical payload in hex; payloadHashHex is SHA-256(payload); leafHashInputHex is the constructed binary input; leafHashHex is SHA-256(leafHashInputHex).

vectors.name: file-sha256-v1-single-byte-A
vectors.note: Worked example matching protocol-v1.md §12.1. File containing the single byte 0x41 ('A').
